SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.utils

Class JkUtilsString

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsString
public final class JkUtilsString extends Object
Utility class for dealing with strings.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JkUtilsString()

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    blankToNull(String in)
    Converts a blank string to null.
    static String
    capitalize(String string)
    Returns the specified string but upper-casing its first character.
    static boolean
    containsAny(String stringToMatch, String... candidates)
    Checks if the given string contains any of the specified candidate substrings.
    static int
    countOccurrence(String matchedString, char occurrence)
    Returns occurrence count of the specified character into the specified string.
    static String
    ellipse(String string, int max)
    Returns the specified string truncated and ending with ... if the specified string is longer than the specified max length.
    static String
    emptyToNull(String in)
    Converts an empty or blank string to null.

    endsWithAny(String stringToMatch, String... candidates)
    Returns true if the specified string ends with any of the candidates.

    Extracts variable tokens enclosed in `${}` from the provided string.

    Returns the first string out of the specified candidates matching the specified string.

    Converts a list of options into a formatted string representation.

    Replaces variable tokens in the given string with the corresponding values provided by the replacer function.

    Checks if a String is whitespace, empty ("") or null.

    Pads the given string with the specified pad character to ensure it reaches the minimum length.

    Returns a string containing the quantity and noun.

    Returns a string containing the quantity and noun.

    Returns a readable representation of command line arguments.

    removePackagePrefix(String fullName)
    Removes the package prefix from a fully qualified name, leaving only the last class name and the subsequent part (e.g., method name or variable).
    static String
    repeat(String pattern, int count)
    Returns a string made of the specified pattern repeat the specified count.
    static String
    shortenPackageName(String fullName)
    Shortens a fully qualified package name by abbreviating all segments except the last class name and appends the remaining part after the class, preserving the structure.

    splitWhiteSpaces(String string)
    Splits the provided string into a list of substrings based on whitespace.

    Returns true if the specified string starts with any of the candidates.

    Checks if the given string starts with an uppercase letter.

    Returns the substring after the first delimiter of the specified occurrence.
    static String
    substringAfterLast(String string, String delimiter)
    Returns the substring after the last delimiter of the specified occurrence.
    static String
    substringBeforeFirst(String string, String delimiter)
    Returns the substring before the first delimiter of the specified occurrence.

    substringBeforeLast(String string, String delimiter)
    Returns the substring before the last delimiter of the specified occurrence.

    Returns the hexadecimal for of the given array of bytes.

  • Constructor Details

    • JkUtilsString

      public JkUtilsString()

  • Method Details

    • capitalize

      public static String capitalize(String string)
      Returns the specified string but upper-casing its first character.

    • uncapitalize

      public static String uncapitalize(String string)
      Returns the specified string but lower-casing its first character.

    • firstMatching

      public static String firstMatching(String stringToMatch, String... candidates)
      Returns the first string out of the specified candidates matching the specified string.

    • countOccurrence

      public static int countOccurrence(String matchedString, char occurrence)
      Returns occurrence count of the specified character into the specified string.

    • substringAfterLast

      public static String substringAfterLast(String string, String delimiter)
      Returns the substring after the last delimiter of the specified occurrence. The delimiter is not part of the result.

    • substringBeforeFirst

      public static String substringBeforeFirst(String string, String delimiter)
      Returns the substring before the first delimiter of the specified occurrence. The delimiter is not part of the result.

    • substringAfterFirst

      public static String substringAfterFirst(String string, String delimiter)
      Returns the substring after the first delimiter of the specified occurrence. The delimiter is not part of the result.

    • substringBeforeLast

      public static String substringBeforeLast(String string, String delimiter)
      Returns the substring before the last delimiter of the specified occurrence. The delimiter is not part of the result. Returns empty string if not found.

    • repeat

      public static String repeat(String pattern, int count)
      Returns a string made of the specified pattern repeat the specified count. So, for example, repeat("##", 3) will return ######

    • pluralize

      public static String pluralize(int count, String singular, String plural)
      Returns a string containing the quantity and noun. The noun is the plural form if quantity > 1.

    • pluralize

      public static String pluralize(int count, String singular)
      Returns a string containing the quantity and noun. The noun is the plural form if quantity greater than 1. The plural form is singular form + 's';

    • toHexString

      public static String toHexString(byte[] raw) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns the hexadecimal for of the given array of bytes.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • endsWithAny

      public static boolean endsWithAny(String stringToMatch, String... candidates)
      Returns true if the specified string ends with any of the candidates.

    • containsAny

      public static boolean containsAny(String stringToMatch, String... candidates)
      Checks if the given string contains any of the specified candidate substrings.

    • startsWithAny

      public static boolean startsWithAny(String stringToMatch, String... stringToCheckEquals)
      Returns true if the specified string starts with any of the candidates.

    • startsWithUpperCase

      public static boolean startsWithUpperCase(String str)
      Checks if the given string starts with an uppercase letter.
      Parameters:
      str - the string to check; may be null or empty
      Returns:
      true if the string starts with an uppercase letter, false otherwise

    • isBlank

      public static boolean isBlank(String string)
      Checks if a String is whitespace, empty ("") or null.

    • isDigits

      public static boolean isDigits(String string)
      Checks if the provided string consists only of digits.

    • extractVariableToken

      public static List<String> extractVariableToken(String string)
      Extracts variable tokens enclosed in `${}` from the provided string. A variable token is a string contained between `${` and `}`.
      Parameters:
      string - the input string from which to extract variable tokens
      Returns:
      a list of variable tokens without the enclosing `${}`; returns an empty list if no variable tokens are present

    • interpolate

      public static String interpolate(String string, Function<String,String> replacer)
      Replaces variable tokens in the given string with the corresponding values provided by the replacer function. Variable tokens are enclosed in `${}`.
      Parameters:
      string - the input string containing variable tokens to be replaced
      replacer - a function that takes a variable token (without `${}`) and returns the replacement value for the token
      Returns:
      the resulting string after variable replacement
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no replacement is defined for a token

    • ellipse

      public static String ellipse(String string, int max)
      Returns the specified string truncated and ending with ... if the specified string is longer than the specified max length. Otherwise, the specified string is returned as is.

    • parseCommandline

      public static String[] parseCommandline(String commandline)
      Parses a command line string and splits it into an array of individual command line arguments.

      Borrowed from ANT.

      Parameters:
      commandline - the command line string to parse
      Returns:
      an array of individual command line arguments
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there are unbalanced quotes in the command line string

    • parseCommandlineAsList

      public static List<String> parseCommandlineAsList(String commandline)
      See Also:
      • parseCommandline(String)

    • padEnd

      public static String padEnd(String string, int minLength, char padChar)
      Pads the given string with the specified pad character to ensure it reaches the minimum length.
      Parameters:
      string - The string to pad.
      minLength - The minimum length the resulting string should have.
      padChar - The character to use for padding.
      Returns:
      The padded string.

    • padStart

      public static String padStart(String string, int minLength, char padChar)
      Pads the given string with the specified pad character to ensure it reaches the minimum length.
      Parameters:
      string - The string to pad.
      minLength - The minimum length the resulting string should have.
      padChar - The character to use for padding.
      Returns:
      The padded string.

    • blankToNull

      public static String blankToNull(String in)
      Converts a blank string to null. If the input string is null, empty, or consists only of whitespaces, this method returns null. Otherwise, it returns the input string.
      Parameters:
      in - the input string

    • nullToEmpty

      public static String nullToEmpty(String in)
      Converts a null string to an empty string. If the input string is null, it returns an empty string. If the input string is not null, it returns the input string as is.
      Parameters:
      in - the input string

    • emptyToNull

      public static String emptyToNull(String in)
      Converts an empty or blank string to null. If the input string is non-empty and non-blank, it is returned unchanged.

    • wrapStringCharacterWise

      public static String wrapStringCharacterWise(String input, int maxLineLength)
      Wraps the given string character-wise to fit within the specified width.

    • withLeftMargin

      public static String withLeftMargin(String paragraph, String margin)
      Returns a string with a left margin added to each line. Each line in the provided paragraph will be prepended with the specified margin.

    • readableCommandAgs

      public static String readableCommandAgs(String margin, List<String> options)
      Returns a readable representation of command line arguments. Each option in the provided list is split by the platform's file separator and concatenated with a new line character (\n).

    • shortenPackageName

      public static String shortenPackageName(String fullName)
      Shortens a fully qualified package name by abbreviating all segments except the last class name and appends the remaining part after the class, preserving the structure. For instance, it replaces "com.example.package.ClassName.method" with "c.e.package.ClassName.method".
      Parameters:
      fullName - The fully qualified package name including the class and optionally the method. If null or if the input does not contain any dot, it is returned as-is.
      Returns:
      A shortened version of the given package name with abbreviated segments, or the original input for invalid cases.

    • removePackagePrefix

      public static String removePackagePrefix(String fullName)
      Removes the package prefix from a fully qualified name, leaving only the last class name and the subsequent part (e.g., method name or variable). This method shortens the package part by retaining only the class name preceding the final segment if it exists.
      Parameters:
      fullName - The fully qualified name from which the package prefix should be removed. If the input is null or does not contain a dot, it is returned as-is.
      Returns:
      The modified string with the package prefix removed, or the original string if no prefix exists or the input is invalid.

    • splitWhiteSpaces

      public static List<String> splitWhiteSpaces(String string)
      Splits the provided string into a list of substrings based on whitespace. Consecutive whitespaces are treated as a single delimiter. Each resulting substring is trimmed. If the input string is null, it is treated as an empty string.

      Null or empty sting result in an empty list.

    • formatOptions

      public static String formatOptions(List<String> options)
      Converts a list of options into a formatted string representation. The formatting depends on the content of the options, where long options containing path separators are split into separate lines, options starting with a dash are formatted with additional indentation, and others are appended as is.
      Parameters:
      options - the list of options to be formatted as a string
      Returns:
      a string representation of the options with appropriate formatting

    • matchesPattern

      public static boolean matchesPattern(String text, String pattern)
      Tests if a string matches a given pattern using '*' as a wildcard joker. The '*' character matches any sequence of characters (including empty sequence).
      Parameters:
      text - the string to test
      pattern - the pattern with '*' wildcards
      Returns:
      true if the text matches the pattern, false otherwise
